_metadata.description: Query the status of an existing Zelle payment by paymentId or endToEndId

status_lifecycle.PENDING: Recipient not enrolled — awaiting enrollment. Expires after 14 days.
status_lifecycle.COMPLETED: Funds credited to recipient — FINAL, cannot be reversed
status_lifecycle.REJECTED: Payment failed — see exceptions block for error details
status_lifecycle.CANCELLED: Payment cancelled while still in PENDING state (only possible before recipient enrolls)

notes: Once COMPLETED, Zelle has no standard return/reversal mechanism
REJECTED payments do NOT debit the sender — funds never left sender's account
Banks may impose their own timeout rules shorter than the 14-day EWS window
Fraud disputes are handled outside the Zelle protocol via the sending bank

api_response_rejected._note: HTTP 200 is returned even for REJECTED — check paymentStatus field

exceptions.errorDescription: Payment exceeds the daily sending limit for this account. Current limit: USD 1000.00.

api_response_all_rejection_codes._note: Reference: common Zelle rejection error codes

error_codes.DAILY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Payment exceeds sender's daily limit (bank-set, not EWS-set)
error_codes.MONTHLY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Payment exceeds sender's monthly cumulative limit
error_codes.RECIPIENT_NOT_ENROLLED_EXPIRED: Recipient did not enrol within 14-day window — payment auto-cancelled
error_codes.INVALID_TOKEN: Email/phone number not associated with any Zelle account
error_codes.ACCOUNT_RESTRICTED: Sender or recipient account has a restriction (e.g., fraud hold)
error_codes.INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS: Insufficient funds in sender's account at time of processing
error_codes.DUPLICATE_PAYMENT: Duplicate detected — same EndToEndId already processed
error_codes.FRAUD_BLOCKED: Payment blocked by EWS or bank fraud detection rules
error_codes.RECIPIENT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Recipient's bank-imposed daily receive limit exceeded
error_codes.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Zelle network temporarily unavailable — retry after backoff
